# AST Transport Management System (VERSION 2026)

> This project uses an AI-first development workflow. To save tokens, avoid indexing lockfiles or media.

## Project Structure
- `frontend/`: Next.js (App Router), TailwindCSS, TypeScript.
- `backend/`: Express, MySQL2, Prisma (Soon), TypeScript.

## Key AI Context Files
If you need specific context, read only these files to save input tokens:
- `PROJECT_PLAN.md`: System roadmap and architecture.
- `PROJECT_PROGRESS.md`: Current sprint/task status. Start here.
- `DATABASE_SCHEMA.md`: The single source of truth for the legacy MySQL database schema.
- `AI_PROJECT_CONTEXT.md`: Global developer rules and Cross-Agent workflow.
- `CLAUDE.md`: Quick instructions specifically for Claude/Cursor agents.

## Design Decisions
- **Caveman Mode Active**: All agents must output responses in terse "caveman" style to save output tokens (~75% reduction).
- **Progressive Disclosure**: Do not grep or read the entire `frontend` or `backend` folder. Navigate to the specific component you are working on.
